---
title: "Лекции"
---

```{=html}
<div class="resource-list resource-list-grid">
  <a class="resource-card resource-card-stat-ru" href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/statistical-analysis-course/ru/slides/">
    <span class="resource-title">Статистический анализ данных</span>
    <span class="resource-note">Русский курс, слайды лекций</span>
  </a>

  <a class="resource-card resource-card-stat-en" href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/statistical-analysis-course/en/slides/">
    <span class="resource-title">Statistical Data Analysis</span>
    <span class="resource-note">English lecture slides</span>
  </a>

  <a class="resource-card resource-card-qft" href="https://neutrinohit.github.io/qft-lectures/">
    <span class="resource-title">Курсы лекций по КТП</span>
    <span class="resource-note">Квантовая теория поля, Стандартная модель, ренормировка и эффект Унру</span>
  </a>
</div>
```
